home.description: A local-first file workbench: WASM image codecs for conversion and compression, browser-side PDF merge, split, and edit flows, plus PWA offline support.
home.title: A file utility polished enough for interviews.
home.summary: Files never leave the browser. This project ties together practical frontend engineering topics: WASM codecs, worker-friendly architecture, client-side PDF workflows, PWA installability, i18n, and testable utility modules.

image.title: Image conversion and compression
image.description: JPEG, PNG, and WebP support. JPEG/WebP use WASM codecs, while PNG can run through OxiPNG WASM optimization.

pdf.title: PDF merge / split / edit
pdf.description: Powered by pdf-lib in the browser. No uploads, a clear client-side document workflow.
pdf.author: Author
pdf.empty: Add PDFs, then choose a workflow.
